## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences. Reference the issue if applicable: "Closes #123" -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (Phase 1 pipeline)
- [ ] Phase 2 feature (new video model / platform)
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs / config

## Testing

- [ ] `DISPATCH_MODE=dry_run pytest tests/ -v` passes
- [ ] Tested manually with a real scout run (if applicable)
- [ ] No API keys or credentials in the diff

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/` clean
- [ ] New behaviour covered by tests or is dry-run-testable
- [ ] `brand.config.example.json` updated if new config keys added
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars added
